parameters.content:
## 💼 Personal Tax Document Organizer

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for tax documents
2. Identifies document type (W-2, 1099, receipts)
3. Extracts income and deduction details
4. Categorizes expenses for tax filing
5. Aggregates totals by category
6. Logs to Google Sheets tax tracker
7. Sends Slack summary with tax prep status

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Drive folder for your tax documents
3. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   Doc Type | Source | Category | Amount | Deductible | Tax Year | Notes | Processed Date
4. Update the folder ID and sheet ID in the nodes
5. Connect your Slack workspace

### Perfect for
- Individual taxpayers
- Freelancers
- Self-employed professionals

parameters.prompt:
Extract tax-related information from this personal document. First identify the document type, then extract relevant fields.

Document types to identify:
- W-2 (employee wages)
- 1099-NEC (freelance/contractor income)
- 1099-INT (bank interest)
- 1099-DIV (dividends)
- 1099-B (brokerage/stock sales)
- 1099-R (retirement distributions)
- 1099-K (payment card transactions)
- K-1 (partnership/S-corp income)
- Mortgage interest statement (1098)
- Student loan interest (1098-E)
- Tuition statement (1098-T)
- Health insurance (1095-A/B/C)
- Charitable donation receipt
- Medical expense receipt
- Business expense receipt
- Home office expense
- Vehicle/mileage log
- Property tax statement
- Other tax document

Extract: document type, tax year, payer or source name, recipient name, total amount, category (income/deduction/credit), subcategory (wages/self-employment/interest/dividends/capital-gains/medical/charitable/business/education/mortgage/property-tax/other), is deductible (true/false), deduction type if applicable (above-the-line/itemized/business), date of transaction or statement, description or memo, quantity if applicable (like mileage), any limitations or notes.
